parameters.query: SELECT id, name, email, company, company_size, message, source, status FROM leads WHERE status = 'new' ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT 50
UPDATE leads SET status = $1, review_reason = $2, requires_human_review = $3, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = $4 RETURNING id, email, status
INSERT INTO lead_audit_log (lead_id, workflow_step, model_version, input_hash, ai_output_json, execution_time_ms) VALUES ($1, 'validation', 'rules-v1', $2, $3::jsonb, 0)

options.queryReplacement: ={{ $json.id }},={{ $('Apply Validation Rules').item.json.input_hash }},={{ JSON.stringify({ status: $json.status, review_reason: $('Apply Validation Rules').item.json.review_reason }) }}
